arguments.summary: Fixed panic in src/cli/args.rs — Args::parse() now returns Result<Self, String> instead of panicking on empty args. Updated src/main.rs to match-handle the Result with graceful error message and exit(1). Initial build failed due to type mismatch — fixed caller. All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed argument parser panic. Changed Args::parse() to return Result with a usage message on missing args. Updated main.rs to handle the Result. Builds clean, all 3 tests pass.
